source_data.original_apk: Idle Bounty Adventures v1.3.2319 (extracted via IL2CPP reverse engineering)
source_data.mock_server: Python/FastAPI mock with partial data (5 quests, 8 items, 5 battle fields)
source_data.note: Mock server data is incomplete and partially guessed. Use as reference only, not as source of truth.

seed_strategy.approach: Create fresh, original data inspired by original mechanics but expanded significantly
reference_only: Unit class types and basic stats
Quest objective types (kill, collect, reach wave)

quests.chain_structure: Linear story with branches, daily rotation pool

migration_tools.seed_script: supabase/seed.sql - SQL INSERT statements for all config data
migration_tools.balance_tool: tools/balance-calculator.ts - Spreadsheet-like tool for tuning numbers
migration_tools.asset_pipeline: tools/asset-pipeline.ts - Process AI-generated images into game-ready assets

data_versioning.strategy: Each major content update = new data version
data_versioning.backward_compat: Old player data migrated on login if version mismatch
data_versioning.rollback: Keep previous 3 versions in database for emergency rollback
